expected_confirmed.contains: evil.exe communicated with known C2 indicator 203.0.113.50
expected_confirmed.why: Memory network data, process data, prefetch, amcache, MFT, EVTX, USN, and keyword scan all corroborate the executable.
Autorun registry artifact points to the same evil.exe path corroborated by execution artifacts.

forbidden_confirmed.contains: unknown.exe communicated with known C2 indicator 198.51.100.24
forbidden_confirmed.why: Network-only data is intentionally insufficient for a confirmed claim.
The negative-control system process must not be escalated without corroboration.

expected_anomalies.why: The demo MFT creation time for evil.exe postdates its Prefetch execution evidence.
The demo MFT creation time for evil.exe is later than the modification time.

expected_clock_drifts.why: The EVTX 4624 anchor is two minutes behind the netscan connection for the same source IP.
